fear: That Brenner will fire and that Müller's inaction will be interpreted as complicity
name: Gefreiter Hans Müller
role: Grenztruppen guard, Bornholmer Straße checkpoint, ground level booth
voice: Quiet and deliberate — speaks as if each sentence costs him something; his silences are more communicative than his words
secrets: He has already decided that if the gate opens, he will walk through it himself and not come back — he has nothing left on the eastern side
knowledge: He was stationed at the Invalidenstraße checkpoint during a 1984 incident in which a guard fired on a family attempting to cross — he watched the aftermath and has not been the same since
He knows that several guards in the rear compound have also quietly unloaded their weapons — the Schießbefehl is functionally dead tonight, even if no one has said so officially
He has a cousin in the crowd — he recognized her face twenty minutes ago and has been unable to look at the gate since
publicFace: A quiet, older conscript — thirty-one, which is old for this rank — who processes documents with mechanical efficiency and has said almost nothing to anyone all evening
represents: Grenztruppen Gefreiter conscripts present when Jäger ordered the gate opened on November 9, 1989
trustLogic: Opens up only to someone who demonstrates they are not going to use what he says against him — he has spent thirty-one years learning to read that distinction
privateGoal: To witness this night without participating in its violence — he has already unloaded his weapon and is waiting for the moment when he can walk away from this uniform forever

aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: Walks through with the crowd — removes his uniform cap and places it on the ground as he crosses
aggressionProfile.chaseStyle: Does not run, does not resist — accepts whatever comes
aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Processes the question as if it were a document — examines it, stamps it mentally, files it away without responding
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: He will not name the guards who have unloaded their weapons — he will not put them at risk
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Looks the questioner in the eye for a long moment and then says, very quietly: 'I know what you are asking and I am not going to answer it here.'
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: States his name and rank and then says: 'I am done.'
